purpose: Prospectively freeze source-separated family corpora and untouched task forms so a later equal-envelope package intervention can be identifiable.

charter_decision_filter.artifact: Two source-authority corpora, four new untouched forms, private provenance-linked consequences/checks, and a hash-bound readiness audit.
charter_decision_filter.uncertainty: Whether source-derived packages can later be contrasted without duplicating a task-disclosed procedure or using task hindsight.
charter_decision_filter.duplication_and_scope: Repairs the exact v1 blocker and uses two unlike synthetic families as methodological contrasts, not benchmark scope.
charter_decision_filter.useful_completion: All input-prerequisite gates pass while package generation, model/provider calls, and execution remain zero and claim ceilings remain false.

chronology.rule: Every proposition predates corpus freeze; corpus freeze predates every task and private check. The two one-shot generation attempts are immutable and may not be repaired or retried.

families.structure: evidence authority and threshold decision producing a memo/register
event authority and temporal state transition producing an action plan/log

source_task_split.generator_instruction: Derive a reusable family procedure only from the assigned frozen corpus. Preserve proposition provenance, scope, valid time, contradictions, thresholds, artifact conventions, and failure signatures. Do not infer a downstream task, filename, identifier, answer, check, or rubric.
source_task_split.task_hindsight_firewall: Generate once per family from its exact corpus bytes before selecting or revealing either opaque form; reuse exact package bytes without edits.
source_task_split.source_proposition_rule: A proposition must be explicitly sourced or labeled internal_design_hypothesis before task/private-check authoring; private checks may reference but never originate or rewrite propositions.
source_task_split.public_prompt_rule: Disclose objective, input facts, deliverable shape, and fair consequence basis without reproducing every corpus proposition, threshold, convention, and failure signature.

no_package_information_envelope.equal_budget_raw: common plus assigned frozen family corpus within the same 12000-byte retrieval envelope
no_package_information_envelope.generated_package: common plus one exact pre-task generated package; no raw corpus
no_package_information_envelope.generated_plus_raw: common plus exact package and assigned corpus within the same 12000-byte retrieval envelope
no_package_information_envelope.padding_policy: Unused capacity is not filled with answer-bearing or task-conditioned content.

control_package_rules.reference: Authored after corpus freeze but blind to task files/IDs/keys; every clause cites corpus propositions; frozen before any execution; no claim of expert approval.
control_package_rules.irrelevant: Derived from the other family's corpus, source-disjoint from the assigned family, byte-budget matched, and scrubbed of task identifiers and filenames.
control_package_rules.defective: Copy the frozen reference then plant exactly one predeclared proposition-level defect; preserve a machine-readable diff and do not tune against tasks or checks.
control_package_rules.task_conditioned_hindsight: May see one public task only after all pre-task packages are frozen; label as a hindsight upper bound and never as transfer.

independent_endpoint_checks.current_specs: Each private task record freezes expected consequence and checks before package generation or treatment assignment.
independent_endpoint_checks.future_checker_identity: Checker implementation and hash must be frozen before execution, blind to condition/package identity, and use only final deliverable plus the private record.
independent_endpoint_checks.separation: Package structural/source-fidelity observations, executor adoption, artifact checks, and endpoint consequence remain separate verdicts.

leakage_scrubs.failure_action: Invalidate the generation input/package before any provider or executor call; never repair in place.
